_comment: Daily in-process refresh of BAKED data catalogs (lib/refresh.mjs). Live-proxied games (mtg/swu/lorcana/lego/fx + English pokemon) need no refresh. riftbound.json and pokemon-intl-sets.json (JP/CN/KO Pokemon set index from TCGdex) go stale on a set drop; funko is frozen upstream (add 'funko' to bakes to force it). interval_hours drives the timer; the boot pass skips catalogs already fresher than interval_hours.
